text:
It's a beautiful spring morning. I wake up with my favorite book in hand. I love mysteries. My favorite is about a wise old owl who solves crimes.

Once, there was a village full of boring villagers.

One day, there was a town cat who stole...

Oh no!

Who did the cat steal the yarn from?

The town cat!

I said.

Yeah?

You said


That's right.

The cat...

I knew.





I didn right clothes.

Then...

He opened his diary.

Yes.

With great enthusiasm.

Oh no!

Who dared?

The cat dared!

Oh no.

He sneaked into the bishop's office...

But...

He got scared...

Of course.

He fell into the soup.

That was...

The fish thief!

Good catch!

Thanks.

The cat...

Read the book.

I did.

That's the clever owl.

The cat thanked him.

The owl sighed.

I have so many secrets.

Yes, I do.

One day.

The owl...

You missed
